🛡️ VaultGuard™ Demo Mode

httpbin.org Integration

What is this?

This demo uses httpbin.org as a transparent echo server to inspect the exact request/response payloads between the VaultGuard client and server. Every challenge generation and verification is proxied through httpbin.org/post, which echoes back the payload — letting you see exactly what data is exchanged.

  • Server-side challenge generation (answers never leave the server)
  • Proof-of-Work with adaptive difficulty
  • Rate limiting with sliding window
  • Real-time network inspection panel
  • All traffic echoed via httpbin.org for transparency

Setup

1

Install dependencies

cd f:\JS-libraries\captcha
npm install express express-session
2

Start the demo server

node demo-server.js

Server starts on http://localhost:3000

3

Open this page

Navigate to http://localhost:3000/demo-httpbin.html

Live CAPTCHA Demo
